text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
57 
CLM_ID 
LABEL: 
CCW Claim Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: This is the unique identification number for the claim. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_ID 
LONG NAME: CLM_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
64 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
FILE(S): 
All header claim, line, and occurrence code files 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The CLM_ID is assigned by the CCW. The CLM_ID is specific to the CCW and is not applicable to any 
other
